raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "summary": "Cross-product assessment complete. CRITICAL: code-index >7 days stale (last update 2026-04-18). Agents are simulating under outdated state. Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products — only MindShift implements. Atlas Gateway decisions on routing not reflected in LifeSim or BrandedBy. P0 item: user data sync across twins (BrandedBy) and assessments (ZEUS) ignored despite ecosystem-map.md flagging as blocking launch. Halt swarm. 2. Run sync-code-index. 3. Patch Law 2 into VOLAURA, LifeSim, BrandedBy, ZEUS. 4. Log gap to atlas-debts-to-ceo.md. 5. Resume"}
summary: Cross-product assessment complete. CRITICAL: code-index >7 days stale (last update 2026-04-18). Agents are simulating under outdated state. Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products — only MindShift implements. Atlas Gateway decisions on routing not reflected in LifeSim or BrandedBy. P0 item: user data sync across twins (BrandedBy) and assessments (ZEUS) ignored despite ecosystem-map.md flagging as blocking launch. Swarm task operates within Constitution — no violations of Foundation Laws or Crystal Economy Laws found.
gaps_in_current_canon: code-index age not verified before swarm execution
no runtime check for Law 2 compliance in CI
ecosystem-map.md not loaded before task allocation
whistleblower_flag: CRITICAL: agents operating on stale index — halt swarm until sync
proposed_action: 1. Halt swarm. 2. Run sync-code-index. 3. Patch Law 2 into VOLAURA, LifeSim, BrandedBy, ZEUS. 4. Log gap to atlas-debts-to-ceo.md. 5. Resume
